description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain pattern and a smooth, ergonomic grip. The handle tapers gently towards the end, providing a comfortable hold for swinging. The axe head is made of dark, matte metal and has a single, broad cutting edge with a slightly convex profile, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle, with the metal head enveloping the top portion of the wood. The poll (back) of the axe head is flat and squared, allowing for striking or hammering. There are no visible decorative elements, engravings, or branding on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, dark metal blade, designed for chopping and striking tasks. The handle is smooth and ergonomic, while the blade is robust and functional.
description_view_0: The axe is shown with its wooden handle extending to the right and the broad metal blade facing left, highlighting the gentle curve and grain of the handle.
description_view_1: This view emphasizes the length of the handle and the thickness of the axe head, with the blade edge partially visible.
description_view_2: The blade's cutting edge is prominent, and the attachment of the head to the handle is clearly visible from this angle.
description_view_3: The flat poll of the axe head is visible, and the curvature of the handle is accentuated, showing the ergonomic grip.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic grip and oval cross-section; natural wood grain visible.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, broad steel blade with a slightly convex edge and flat poll; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade head fitted over the top of the wooden handle.
